LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ROBERT LONSDALE'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST ATTORNEY NOEL KNIGHT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 128.7 IS DENIED. DECLINING TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL IS NOT SANCTIONABLE CONDUCT UNDER C C P 128.7(B) AND IN ANY EVENT WOULD NOT JUSTIFY SANCTION IN THIS CASE. OPPOSING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Sanctions Against Attorney Noel Knight
Off Calendar Feb-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF ROBERT LONSDALE'S MOTION For Sanctions Against Attorney Noel Knight Pursuant to CCP SECTION 128.7 IS DENIED. DECLINING TO WITHDRAW AS COUNSEL IS NOT SANCTIONABLE CONDUCT UNDER C C P 128.7(B) AND IN ANY EVENT WOULD NOT JUSTIFY SANCTION IN THIS CASE. Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
